features: 24-Hour Moisturisaton: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream is clinically proven to moisturise for 24 hours.
Apricot & Honey Fragrance: Delicious smelling apricot and honey fragrance, formula contains Probiotic Oat & Probiotic Greek Yogurt Extract.
Dermatologist Tested: Helps reinforce the skin's natural barrier and help’s to improve its natural balance for healthy looking and more resilient skin from the first use.
Suitable for Sensitive Skin: Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream revitalises normal to dry skin and is suitable for sensitive skin.
Unique formula: Rich and creamy formula that saturates your body with nourishing moisture.
description: Product Description Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream saturates your body with nourishing moisture and revitalises normal to dry skin. With a delicious smelling apricot and honey fragrance, this cream helps reinforce the skin's natural barrier and improves its natural balance for healthy looking and more resilient skin from the first use. Formulated with prebiotic oat and Probiotic Greek yogurt extract, its rich and creamy formula is clinically proven to provide 24-hour moisturisation. Aveeno Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Cream is dermatologist tested and is suitable for sensitive skin. Ingredients Aqua, Glycerin, Distearyldimonium Chloride, Isopropyl Palmitate, Petrolatum, Cetyl Alcohol, Dimethicone, Avena Sativa Kernel (Oat) Flour, Yogurt Powder, Ethylhexylglycerin, Polysorbate 60, Hydroxyethylcellulose, Sodium Chloride, Disodium Phosphate, Lactic acid, Sodium Phosphate, Tocopherol, Phenoxyethanol, Parfum, CI 77891. [PR-018017] Directions Start with AVEENO Â® Daily Moisturising Yogurt Body Wash for an enriching experience for your skin and senses.
